text_template: Support for the show today comes from Framer, not Farmer for those of you with bad eyesight. These days, if you're a business owner, you need to have a website that can actually help your business grow. And with Framer, you can do it quickly and easily. Framer is a website builder that works like your team's favorite design tool with real-time collaboration or robust CMS. With everything you need for great SEO and advanced analytics that include integrated A-B testing, your designers and marketers are empowered to build and maximize your dot-com from day one. Changes to your Framer site go live to the web in seconds with one click without help from engineering, which can help your team reduce dependencies and reach escape velocity. Cisney, that sounds cool. You can learn how you can get more out of your .com from a Framer specialist or get started building for free today at Framer.com slash explain for 30% off of Framer Pro annual plan.
